headline: Bank Of America Advises Hedging Portfolios Ahead Of Potential Q3 S&P 500 Pullback, Warns Of 'Three-Wave Correction'
summary: Bank of America Corp. is warning investors to hedge their portfolios as the bank sees a potential correction in the S&P 500 index in the third quarter of the current fiscal year. Signs Of Market Exhaustion According to a Bloomberg...

headline: Bank of America (BAC) Stock Looks Reasonable On Earnings But Stretched Versus Fair Value
summary: Bank of America has more than doubled investors' money over the past three years, yet valuation checks show a mixed picture, with the intrinsic value estimate pointing to upside while market multiples suggest the stock is closer to fairly priced. Bank of America has returned 110.4% over three years, which puts current buyers in a very different position to those who entered before the rally. Strong earnings momentum and higher rate expectations can support earnings power, while regulatory...

headline: Umicore - Transparency notification by Bank of America Corporation
summary: Transparency notification byBank of America Corporation In accordance with article 14, § 1 of the law of 2 May 2007 on the disclosure of major holdings, Umicore was recently notified by Bank of America Corporation that it has crossed the legal threshold of 3% for the direct voting rights and equivalent financial instruments downwards on 25 June 2026. The total holding of direct voting rights and equivalent financial instruments of Bank of America Corporation stands at 2.38% on 25 June 2026. Summ

headline: BofA CEO Brian Moynihan dismisses recession fears despite Wall Street's most hawkish Fed forecast
summary: Bank of America CEO Brian Moynihan says a recession is not coming despite his firm predicting three Federal Reserve rate hikes and inflation through 2028.

headline: S&P Winning Streak for July at Risk With Volatile End to Month

headline: Mega-Deals Drive Global M&A to $2.8 Trillion in First Half of 2026

headline: Bank of America Likely To Report Higher Q2 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
summary: Bank of America (BAC) will release Q2 earnings on July 14, with analysts expecting $1.10/share profit and $30.26B revenue. Stock fell 1.6% on Tuesday.
